title: Warm Home Discount (WHD): cost recovery
body: "The costs of the Warm Home Discount (£39 on the typical dual fuel bill) are recovered by suppliers through the standing charge: a fixed daily fee applied to all customers regardless of energy usage.  This consultation seeks views on the impacts of a proposal to move WHD cost recovery from the standing charge to the unit rate - the per-kWh charge for electricity and gas usage - for both consumers and suppliers. We are seeking views from energy suppliers, WHD recipients, consumer groups and consumers on how WHD costs are recovered.  Read our consultation privacy notice.  "
